issues.description: First effect should use trigger 'Activated' (optional ability: 'You may rest this Character'), not 'OnPlay'. OnPlay is automatic.
Rest action should be a condition/cost for the ability, not an action. The ability reads 'You may rest this Character: [effect]', meaning Rest is the cost to activate, not the result.
Second effect trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. This is an automatic end-of-turn effect.
Missing condition check. Should verify 'LeaderHasAnyType' or opponent life count condition. Text states 'If your opponent has 2 or less Life cards' - requires proper condition structure.
Duration missing. First effect is 'You may rest this Character' - should clarify this is a optional/activated ability with proper cost structure.
No condition defined to check opponent's Life card count (≤2). DSL must include condition evaluation before drawing/trashing actions.
